title: Home Dashboard
summary: Where you start your day. See your glucose and trend right now, confirm at a glance that Luna watched overnight (system, reservoir, battery), read the full overnight graph, and get a plain-language recap of how the night went.

title: Settings
summary: Manage how Luna works for you. See that Hypo Shield is active, turn IOB Display on or off, check your CGM and Luna Controller, and find help.

title: Session History
summary: Look back at your nights. Pick a date range, see time-in-range and how much insulin Luna delivered for a night, and open the overnight graph to see what happened while you slept.

title: Hardware Checkpoint
summary: Reassures you that Luna can see your controller and sensor before the night starts. It's informational — it confirms you're ready but never blocks you from continuing.

title: Home — default tip
summary: Resting state: Hypo Shield tells you it's learning about you (the bubble only ever appears to communicate something). The long-acting dose chip opens Settings · Hypo Shield.

title: Learning state & dosing mode
summary: Pre-suggestion: Luna learns before suggesting — 5 Luna sessions AND 7 days of wear, shown against your own nights. Links to How Hypo Shield works.

title: Home — suggestion ready
summary: A long-acting dose suggestion is available — a compact notice, no dose detail. The only action opens the full-screen suggestion review; reading never accepts.

title: Push notification — prompt to open
summary: Lock-screen push: prompt-to-open only — no dose value, no action on the lock screen. Tapping the banner opens the in-app suggestion review. iOS 16+ bottom-stack placement.

title: Dose confirmation
summary: Safely act on a dose suggestion: check both boxes — you'll take the new dose, and Luna can auto-adjust the setting — then a single Confirm button. The safeguard behind every Hypo Shield change.

title: Confirmation — settings adjusted
summary: Positive confirmation after the confirm: long-acting dose updated to 14 U, a reminder to take the actual dose this evening, and relearning started.

title: Settings — Hypo Shield
summary: On/off toggle + clear state, and a plain explanation of what Hypo Shield is and how it works (merged from the old How-it-works screen). White-card layout matching the rest of the feature.

title: Home dashboard — IOB Display enabled
summary: Opted-in Home: the active-insulin (IOB) row appears (OFF by default). Decision-support only — 0.1 U, capital U, Luna-delivered insulin only; never instructs a dose.

title: Pre-session IOB announcement
summary: Insight card announcing IOB Display + the shared two-step component reused as an opt-in acknowledgement (NOT a dose action). Slide turns the display on.

title: Settings — IOB Display toggle (default OFF)
summary: Opt-in toggle, default OFF, with a plain-language explanation: Luna-delivered insulin only, avoid stacking, information not instruction.

title: Session History detail — residual Luna IOB
summary: Drilled-in session detail surfacing the residual Luna IOB after a session ends (0.1 U, capital U), shown so you can avoid stacking a manual dose.

title: Chapter 1 — What Luna is
summary: Frame-before-data: what Luna is and isn't, before any data collection. Required completion, no skip valve.

title: Chapter 2 — Tell Luna your routine (TDBD capture)
summary: Capture current TDBD as prescribed — plain data capture, NOT the two-step dose gesture. Mealtime/bolus isn't entered.

title: Chapter 3 — Pair Luna Capsule (BLE)
summary: Pair the Luna Capsule over Bluetooth (calm moon-in-orbit detect). Tonight panel 1 of 3. Continue never gated on BLE status.

title: Chapter 4 — Pair CGM (Dexcom G7)
summary: Pair the CGM (Dexcom G7). CGM status reads 'Recent reading OK'. Tonight panel 2 of 3.

title: Chapter 5 — Handoff to Apollo Training
summary: Clean handoff into Apollo Training (coordinator closeout). Tonight panel complete (3 of 3) → Start Luna Training.

title: Setup Landing (none / Luna complete / all)
summary: Setup landing across the three states; a selector flips the Tonight panel + primary CTA. Luna needs all three before the first night.

title: UI Walkthrough (1 of 5)
summary: Brief UI walkthrough that reads as one onboarding with Apollo (BR-B5); module-scoped dots; spotlighted night-view preview.

title: Tonight Panel — fill states across the arc
summary: Review aid: the recurring Tonight panel filling across States 0–3. Order locked: pair Luna → pair CGM → enter TDBD.

title: Setup App Walkthrough (1–5 + Done)
summary: Guided UI tour (5 stops + Done) reading as one continuous onboarding; module-scoped dots; spotlights the status strip first.

title: Session History Intro (first-run, 1–4)
summary: First-run education before any session is logged; spotlighted preview of a future session summary.

title: Long-acting insulin (plain capture)
summary: Plain capture of the current long-acting (basal) insulin dose — NOT the two-step gesture. Generic 'long-acting insulin' only.

title: Settings — Luna Controller (device management)
summary: Device management: state hero, device details, paired CGM ('Recent reading OK'), rename / forget controller.

title: Training start
summary: Evening entry. Over the Home dashboard, a bottom sheet asks whether to start the first Luna session now.

title: Training gate — preconditions
summary: Conditional gate (shown only on failure): TDBD entered, Capsule paired & present, recent CGM. Routes back to setup to fix.

title: Intro — first session setup
summary: Calm centered intro into Apollo Training (continuation of onboarding). 'Let's get you ready for tonight.'

title: Step 01 — Inventory
summary: Evening setup 1 of 6. Getting ready for your first sleep — gather pen, Single-Sleep Reservoir, charged Luna Capsule (still, no video).

title: Step 02 — Open Reservoir
summary: Evening setup 2 of 6. Lift the lid until it clicks. Auto-looping video; no 'Watch again'.

title: Step 03 — Fill Reservoir
summary: Evening setup 3 of 6. Dial [X] units — dose value [X] is an OPEN flag (Eng/Clinical), rendered as a real token, never fabricated.

title: Step 04 — Attach capsule
summary: Evening setup 4 of 6. Snap the controller on; lift straight up to remove the adhesive liner.

title: Luna is preparing
summary: Un-numbered interstitial after Attach. Verifies CGM data, capsule attached, priming; auto-advances on success; failure → troubleshooting.

title: Pending — troubleshooting
summary: Failure state for the readiness check (shown only on error): flags whether the issue is CGM, the Capsule not seated on the Single-Sleep Reservoir, or priming, with Try again / Back to setup.

title: Step 05 — Remove from base
summary: Evening setup 5 of 6. Lift the assembled device off its base; it's ready to apply.

title: Step 06 — Apply to body
summary: Evening setup 6 of 6. Apply it to your upper arm — press firmly for a few seconds.

title: Overnight handoff — Luna active
summary: Calm overnight handoff: peaceful-sleep image, no time shown, and an intro to Phase 2 (morning training after you sleep).

title: Morning training start
summary: Morning re-entry (~4h after session start). Bottom sheet over the dashboard to begin removal; step count restarts at 1.

title: Morning start
summary: Morning re-entry — a fresh sunrise start; progress dots from the beginning of the 3-step morning module.

title: Step 01 — Remove Luna
summary: Morning removal 1 of 3. Good morning — gently peel the adhesive off your body to remove Luna. Warns of the exposed needle.

title: Step 02 — Unclip capsule
summary: Morning removal 2 of 3. Unclip the Luna capsule from the Single-Sleep Reservoir; hardware check gates Next until removal is detected.

title: Step 03 — Charge Capsule
summary: Morning removal 3 of 3. Place Luna on the Bedside Charging Dock; hardware check gates Done until the capsule is recognized.

title: Complete
summary: Training complete (merged with the morning outro). This is where Luna really begins — now learning you + your TDBD.

title: Post-session Load states 1-4
summary: Deferred to the single Dark-UI re-skin sweep; legacy 2021 stand-in for now.

title: Default-from-notification / Default-return
summary: Deferred to the single Dark-UI re-skin sweep; legacy 2021 stand-in for now.

title: Get to Know / Legend Slide-Up
summary: Deferred to the single Dark-UI re-skin sweep; legacy 2021 stand-in for now.

title: Pair Luna failures (failed / again / expired / multiple)
summary: Deferred to the single Dark-UI re-skin sweep; legacy 2021 stand-in for now.

title: Session History - Swipe / Swipe 2-3
summary: Deferred to the single Dark-UI re-skin sweep; legacy 2021 stand-in for now.

title: Session History - No Data / No Session on Day
summary: Deferred to the single Dark-UI re-skin sweep; legacy 2021 stand-in for now.

title: Settings - App / About / Help
summary: Deferred to the single Dark-UI re-skin sweep; legacy 2021 stand-in for now.

title: Searching / App Error / Sign-out Error
summary: Deferred to the single Dark-UI re-skin sweep; legacy 2021 stand-in for now.
